response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems development experience with a focus on scalability and tooling, aligning well with the technical demands of the role. However, his background lacks explicit evidence of deep experimentation platform development or AI-first growth systems at enterprise scale, which are critical for this Principal-level position.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in designing and shipping scalable systems across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, and cloud).
Proven technical leadership in architecting tools and frameworks (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators) with a focus on usability and performance.
Strong hands-on coding skills in relevant languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, C/C++, Dlang) and familiarity with distributed systems and telemetry.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with experimentation platforms, rollout automation, or bias detection in A/B testing frameworks.
No clear evidence of leading multi-team initiatives or translating business goals into measurable engineering outcomes at enterprise scale.
While AI tooling is mentioned, the resume lacks depth in AI-first growth systems or their integration into experimentation workflows.
